name: Warm Turkey-And-Sweet Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the dressing: Combine mustard and egg in a large mixing bowl and mix well. Set aside.
2. Place cream and dried tarragon leaves in a small saucepan and bring to a boil over medium heat on the stove. Remove from heat and whisk hot cream into the mustard/yolk mixture. If using fresh tarragon, add it now. Slowly whisk in 3 tablespoons oil. Set dressing aside.
3. Prepare the salad: Remove tough watercress stems and discolored leaves. Place trimmed leaves in cold water. Remove dark green outer leaves and root tip of butter lettuce. Separate lettuce leaves and wash with watercress. Remove from water, dry well, and set aside.
4. Prepare potato salad: Cut potatoes into 1-inch pieces. Place in a pot, cover with water, and bring to high heat on the stove until potatoes are soft. Drain potatoes, place in a mixing bowl, pour vinegar over, cover, and let sit for 5 minutes. Add turkey to the potatoes in the bowl and mix well.
5. To serve, add watercress and lettuce to the bowl. Mix well and mound onto plates.
